title: Change Record — the unit of governance
description: Lives at .asdlc/changes/<id>/change.json in the consuming repo. Deliberately thin: state is derived from evidence, never stored here.

opened_by.description: Identity that opened the record, e.g. github:login.

spec_version.description: The asdlc spec version this change is governed under, pinned at open time.

parent_change_id.description: Reserved: federation hook for multi-repo changes (open question 1).
